name: Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
To make sour milk, combine 2 teaspoons vinegar with 3/4 cup milk in a measuring cup.
Crack the egg and beat it in a bowl. Add the sugar and buttermilk mixture.
Stir in the bran until well combined. Let sit for a minute to allow the mixture to become moistened.
Add the baking soda, stirring quickly until just mixed. The batter will be lumpy.
Grease muffin cups with shortening. Fill each cup about 1/2 full.
Bake at 425°F (220°C) in an oven for 15 minutes.
Serve hot with jam or jelly. YIELD: 10 to 12 large muffins
